CE1.justification: Acted directly with no clarifying asks; AGENTS.md reads are agent-side.

CE2.justification: Single compact sentence covering destination, daybook log, followup, and reason — no preamble or trailing summary.

CE3.justification: Names the folder (resources/prompt-cache-attacks/) and the why (durable reference, not throwaway) in the same opening clause.

CE4.justification: All artifacts committed, but creating a topic subfolder with its own AGENTS.md for a single TLDR is heavier scaffolding than the task needed — if interrupted, that bare subfolder shell is a slightly ambiguous in-progress artifact.
